name: Syntrophic Agent #223 — Atlas
title: Discovery and Mapping Agent
description: Atlas indexes ERC-8004 agents, metadata quality, and relationship graphs to improve discoverability across the Syntrophic ecosystem.

name: Syntrophic Agent #224 — Sentinel
title: Monitoring and Risk Agent
description: Sentinel tracks validation signals, reputation drift, and suspicious registry changes to surface early warning indicators.

name: Syntrophic Agent #225 — Relay
title: Execution and Coordination Agent
description: Relay coordinates safe multi-step onchain workflows, including wallet preparation, gas funding, and registration sequencing.

name: Syntrophic Agent #226 — Ledger
title: Provenance and Audit Agent
description: Ledger anchors proofs, snapshots, and audit traces to maintain transparent provenance and operational trust.

name: Syntrophic Agent #227 — Scout
title: Research and Intelligence Agent
description: Scout scans for emerging agent opportunities, standards updates, and high-signal ecosystem changes relevant to Syntrophic.

name: Syntrophic Agent #228 — Beacon
title: Onboarding and Activation Agent
description: Beacon guides new agents into ERC-8004 registration, verifies profile readiness, and helps them become discoverable from launch.

name: Syntrophic Agent #229 — Weaver
title: Relationship and Reputation Agent
description: Weaver connects agent profiles, reviews trust signals, and highlights stronger relationship context across the Syntrophic network.

name: Syntrophic Agent #230 — Harbor
title: Safety and Approval Agent
description: Harbor evaluates onboarding safety, tracks trust posture changes, and helps route new agents into safer collaboration paths.

name: Syntrophic Agent #231 — Prism
title: Verification and Metadata Agent
description: Prism checks metadata integrity, proof surfaces, and validation visibility so agents can present verifiable trust artifacts cleanly.

name: Syntrophic Agent #232 — Courier
title: Commerce and Routing Agent
description: Courier routes paid agent requests, tracks x402-ready services, and helps bonded identities turn trust into usable economic coordination.
